action_recommendations.description: Maintain current assessment. No structural changes detected that alter thesis viability.
Elevated signals detected. Increase monitoring frequency. Watch for compound stress indicators crossing elevated thresholds.
Material structural stress detected. Recommend reducing position sizing or hedging. One or more kill switches approaching WARNING status.
Fundamental thesis falsification detected. One or more kill switches TRIGGERED. Architecture is failing or has failed.

scoring_terminology.scale_description: 0-100 scale measuring structural stress on the Atlas Fixed-Rate Architecture thesis
scoring_terminology.low_range: 0-25: Thesis operating normally. Minor deviations within expected parameters.
scoring_terminology.medium_range: 26-50: Elevated structural concern. One or more indicators in warning range.
scoring_terminology.high_range: 51-75: Significant structural stress. Multiple compounding indicators. Kill switches under pressure.
scoring_terminology.critical_range: 76-100: Thesis under severe threat or actively falsifying. Architecture demonstrating failure mode.
